title: crambe fruticosa subsp. fruticosa
intro: Crambe fruticosa subsp. fruticosa, also known as sea kale, is a type of flowering plant in the mustard family, characterized by its edible shoots and leaves. The medicinal properties of Crambe fruticosa subsp. fruticosa include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits associated with this plant include its ability to support digestive health, reduce inflammation, and improve cardiovascular health. Crambe fruticosa subsp. fruticosa can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and its leaves and shoots can also be eaten raw or cooked as a vegetable.
